word: H4314 - מֵי זָהָב - Mêy Zâhâb - may zaw-hawb' - Mezahab

sections.paragraph:
Original: מי זהב

Transliteration: mêy zâhâb

Phonetic: may zaw-hawb'

BDB Definition:

Mezahab = "waters of gold"
  1. father of Matred and grandfather of Mehetabel, the wife of Hadad, the last named king of Edom

Origin: from H4325 and H2091, water of gold

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
